action.reasoning: Observation: I have the Evaluator source code. It calls evaluate_single_episode with per-episode config. I need to write predict.py that: 1) loads Pi0 zero-shot, 2) wraps it as an Agent, 3) uses the Evaluator properly. The key challenge is the action bridge from Pi0's 7-D LIBERO output to VLABench EE control (pos, euler, gripper). Analysis: Pi0 outputs 32-D actions (padded), first 7 are active: [dx, dy, dz, droll, dpitch, dyaw, gripper]. VLABench EE control expects absolute (pos, euler, gripper). Need to use ee_state + delta approach. Decision: Write predict.py with Pi0 zero-shot baseline, submit eval to get baseline score and measure eval time.
